title: HMCTS Strategic Engagement Group meetings
body: "The Chair’s summary notes of meetings for legal professional societies, held every two months.  The group has a strategic overview of engagement activities across the programme. The membership includes the jurisdictional leaders of HMCTS and policy leaders from legal representation organisations including the Bar Council, the Chartered Institute of Legal Executives and the Law Society.  The summaries include jurisdictional and project-level updates, which may be useful to others who want updates on projects within the HMCTS. "
